leadText: The Blastoisinite (Japanese: カメックスナイト Kamexnite) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It is the Mega Stone that allows Blastoise to Mega Evolve into Mega Blastoise.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Blastoise (or is present in the player 's Bag P E ), the Blastoisinite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Blastoise if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Blastoisinite from Blastoise. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Blastoise, the Blastoisinite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Blastoise when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Blastoise will remain a Mega Blastoise until the Talent Round ends.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Blastoise (or is present in the player 's Bag P E ), the Blastoisinite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Blastoise if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Blastoisinite from Blastoise.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y One variety of the mysterious Mega Stones. Have Blastoise hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. OR AS S M US UM Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Blastoise hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. P E One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. This stone will enable Blastoise to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A Blastoise holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.

Tidal S M US UM Battle Tree (from Red after defeating him in a Single Challenge S M , or him or Blue in any Challenge US UM ) P E Professor Oak's Laboratory (from Blue after earning seven Badges ) ZA Stone Emporium (after completing Main Mission 09: "Chase That Mysterious Pokémon!" ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period OR AS 2016 Pokémon World Championships Squirtle United States August 19 to 21, 2016 X Y OR AS Pokémon Lab Kanto Squirtle Japanese July 8 to November 30, 2015 Pokémon Scrap 2016 Blastoise Japanese April 28 to August 31, 2016
